devdoc.author: edsphinx
devdoc.details: Ensure all adapters return 1e18-scaled quotes. Emits events for tracing and deviation validation.

AddressEmptyCode(address).details: There's no code at `target` (it is not a contract).

ERC1967InvalidImplementation(address).details: The `implementation` of the proxy is invalid.

ERC1967NonPayable().details: An upgrade function sees `msg.value > 0` that may be lost.

FailedCall().details: A call to an address target failed. The target may have reverted.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

UUPSUnauthorizedCallContext().details: The call is from an unauthorized context.

UUPSUnsupportedProxiableUUID(bytes32).details: The storage `slot` is unsupported as a UUID.

Initialized(uint64).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

Upgraded(address).details: Emitted when the implementation is upgraded.

emergencyWithdrawEth(address).details: This contract is not designed to hold ETH. This function exists      to recover any ETH accidentally sent to it.

params.deviationBps: Max allowed deviation in basis points

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.enabled: True to enable, false to disable

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

_oracles.details: Slither false positive: mappings are initialized to empty by default in Solidity

devdoc.title: MultiOracleAggregator (UUPS Upgradeable + Trusted Forwarder Compatible)

EthWithdrawn(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when ETH is withdrawn from the contract

MaxDeviationUpdated(uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when the maximum deviation is updated

OracleAdded(address,address,address).notice: Emitted when a new oracle is added to a pair

OracleRemoved(address,address,uint256).notice: Emitted when an oracle is removed by index

OracleToggled(address,address,uint256,bo.notice: Emitted when an oracle is toggled (enabled/disabled)

OracleUpdated(address,address,uint256,ad.notice: Emitted when an oracle is updated

QuoteDeviationRejected(address,address,a.notice: Emitted when a quote is rejected due to deviation

QuoteUsed(address,address,address,uint25.notice: Emitted when a quote is successfully used

TrustedForwarderUpdated(address,address).notice: Emitted when the trusted forwarder is updated

addOracle(address,address,address).notice: Adds an oracle for a base/quote pair

computeQuoteAverage(uint256,address,addr.notice: Returns average quote after filtering as view

computeQuoteMedian(uint256,address,addre.notice: Returns median quote after filtering as view

emergencyWithdrawEth(address).notice: Withdraws any ETH accidentally sent to this contract

getOracles(address,address).notice: Returns list of registered oracles for a pair

initialize(address,uint256).notice: Initializes the contract with the owner and deviation settings

oracleCount(address,address).notice: Returns the number of oracles for a pair

removeOracle(address,address,uint256).notice: Removes an oracle from a pair by index

setMaxDeviationBps(uint256).notice: Sets the maximum deviation allowed between quotes

setTrustedForwarder(address).notice: Sets the trusted forwarder for meta-transactions

userdoc.notice: Aggregates multiple oracle feeds and provides average/median pricing with full traceability.
